top.title: Judge rules gun, writings are admissible in Luigi Mangione's New York murder trial
top.summary: Other items found with Mangione at a Pennsylvania McDonald's will not be allowed to be presented in court, the judge ruled.

top.title: Two men arrested over stunt at enclosure of famed monkey Punch
top.summary: Two US nationals have been arrested after one jumped the fence of the monkey, who went viral online, police say.

top.title: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt booed by graduates at mention of AI
top.summary: The reaction underscores a growing anxiety among students over AI's impact on jobs and their future careers.

top.title: Instant AI answers can trivialise human intelligence, warns Royal Observatory
top.summary: Paddy Rodgers said the Observatory's rich history showed the power of human knowledge and the need to avoid "dependence" on AI.

top.title: X pledges quicker action on hate and terror content in the UK
top.summary: Ofcom said the commitments were of particular importance after recent crimes targeting Jewish communities in the UK.

top.title: Claim, counter-claim and tech's seedy side exposed: Five things we learned in the Musk-Altman trial
top.summary: As the jury deliberates, this is what we found out during the weeks-long trial with two tech titans at its heart.
